what: Structure of combined Fude Polygon data with agricultural community boundary data
title: Structure of combined Fude Polygon data with agricultural community boundary data
code: library(fude)  d <- read_fude("~/2022_38.zip", quiet = TRUE, supplementary = TRUE) b <- get_boundary(d, path = "~", quiet = TRUE)  d2 <- read_fude("~/MB0001_2025_2020_38.zip", quiet = TRUE)

previous_headings: Structure of combined Fude Polygon data with agricultural community boundary data
title: Structure of combined Fude Polygon data with agricultural community boundary data
text: 7 types objects obtained combine_fude(), follows:  Source: Created processing data Ministry Agriculture, Forestry Fisheries, “Fude Polygon Data (released FY 2022)” “Agricultural Community Boundary Data (FY 2020)”.
code: library(sf)  db <- d |>   lapply(st_transform, crs = 4612) |>   combine_fude(b, city = "松山市", rcom = "由良|北浦|鷲ケ巣|門田|馬磯|泊|御手洗|船越") names(db) ## [1] "fude"       "fude_split" "rcom"       "rcom_union" "kcity"      ## [6] "city"       "pref" library(ggplot2)  ggplot() +   geom_sf(data = db$fude, aes(fill = rcom_romaji), alpha = .8) +   guides(fill = guide_legend(reverse = TRUE, title = "Agricultural community")) +   theme_void() +   theme(legend.position = "bottom") +   theme(text = element_text(family = "Hiragino Sans"))

previous_headings: Structure of combined Fude Polygon data with agricultural community boundary data > GeoJSON data characteristics (obtain data #1)
title: Structure of combined Fude Polygon data with agricultural community boundary data
text: db$fude: Automatically assigns polygons boundaries community. db$fude_split: Provides cleaner boundaries, polygon data near community borders may divided.  Source: Created processing data Ministry Agriculture, Forestry Fisheries, “Fude Polygon Data (released FY 2022)” “Agricultural Community Boundary Data (FY 2020)”. need adjust automatic assignment, need write custom code. rows require attention can identified following command.
code: library(patchwork)  fude <- ggplot() +   geom_sf(data = db$fude, aes(fill = rcom_romaji), alpha = .8) +   theme_void() +   theme(legend.position = "none") +   coord_sf(xlim = c(132.658, 132.678), ylim = c(33.887, 33.902))  fude_split <- ggplot() +   geom_sf(data = db$fude_split, aes(fill = rcom_romaji), alpha = .8) +   theme_void() +   theme(legend.position = "none") +   coord_sf(xlim = c(132.658, 132.678), ylim = c(33.887, 33.902))  fude + fude_split library(dplyr)  db$fude |>   filter(polygon_uuid %in% (db$fude_split |> filter(duplicated(polygon_uuid)) |> pull(polygon_uuid))) |>   st_drop_geometry() |>   select(polygon_uuid, kcity_name, rcom_name, rcom_romaji) |>   head() ## # A tibble: 6 × 4 ##   polygon_uuid                         kcity_name rcom_name rcom_romaji ##   <chr>                                <fct>      <fct>     <fct>       ## 1 8085bc47-9af5-440f-89e9-f188d3b95746 興居島村   泊        Tomari      ## 2 26920da0-b63e-4994-a9eb-175e2982fe21 興居島村   門田      Kadota      ## 3 ac2e7293-6c2f-4feb-a95f-4729dc8d0aec 興居島村   由良      Yura        ## 4 ea130038-7035-4cf3-b71c-091783090d74 興居島村   船越      Funakoshi   ## 5 4aba8229-1b14-4eab-8a91-e10d9e841180 興居島村   船越      Funakoshi   ## 6 156a3459-25cb-494c-824f-9ba6b0fb6f23 興居島村   由良      Yura

previous_headings: Structure of combined Fude Polygon data with agricultural community boundary data
title: Structure of combined Fude Polygon data with agricultural community boundary data
text: FlatGeobuf format offers efficient alternative GeoJSON. notable feature format record already includes accurately assigned agricultural community code.  Source: Created processing data Ministry Agriculture, Forestry Fisheries, “Fude Polygon Data (released FY 2025)” “Agricultural Community Boundary Data (FY 2020)”.
code: db <- combine_fude(d2, b, city = "松山市", rcom = "由良|北浦|鷲ケ巣|門田|馬磯|泊|御手洗|船越")  ggplot() +   geom_sf(data = db$fude, aes(fill = rcom_romaji), alpha = .8) +   guides(fill = guide_legend(reverse = TRUE, title = "Agricultural community")) +   theme_void() +   theme(legend.position = "bottom") +   theme(text = element_text(family = "Hiragino Sans"))

what: Possible values for rcom in combine_fude() and extract_boundary()
title: Structure of combined Fude Polygon data with agricultural community boundary data
text: 出典：農林水産省「農業集落境界データ（2020年度）」を加工して作成。
code: library(data.tree)  tree <- b[[1]] |>   filter(grepl("松山", kcity_name)) |>   mutate(pathString = paste(pref_name, city_name, kcity_name, rcom_name, sep = "/")) |>   data.tree::as.Node()  tree$Do(\(x) {x$n <- if (x$isLeaf) NA_integer_ else x$count}) data.tree::SetFormat(tree, "n", \(x) if (is.na(x)) "-" else x) print(tree, "n", limit = 30) ##                             levelName   n ## 1  愛媛県                               1 ## 2   °--松山市                          1 ## 3       °--松山市                    108 ## 4           ¦--土居田                  - ## 5           ¦--針田                    - ## 6           ¦--小栗第１                - ## 7           ¦--小栗第２                - ## 8           ¦--小栗第３                - ## 9           ¦--藤原第１                - ## 10          ¦--藤原第２                - ## 11          ¦--竹原東                  - ## 12          ¦--竹原西                  - ## 13          ¦--生石南                  - ## 14          ¦--生石北                  - ## 15          ¦--八代                    - ## 16          ¦--南味酒                  - ## 17          ¦--南江戸                  - ## 18          ¦--朝美１                  - ## 19          ¦--朝美２                  - ## 20          ¦--朝美３                  - ## 21          ¦--宮西                    - ## 22          ¦--六軒家                  - ## 23          ¦--衣山                    - ## 24          ¦--萱町９                  - ## 25          ¦--山越                    - ## 26          ¦--姫原                    - ## 27          ¦--御幸寺                  - ## 28          ¦--本町９                  - ## 29          ¦--本町８                  - ## 30          °--... 82 nodes w/ 0 sub   - ggplot(data = b[[1]] |> filter(grepl("松山", kcity_name))) +    geom_sf(fill = NA) +   geom_sf_text(aes(label = rcom_name), size = 2, family = "Hiragino Sans") +   theme_void() library(collapsibleTree)  b[[1]] |>   filter(grepl("松山", city_name)) |>   distinct(pref_name, city_name, kcity_name, rcom_name) |>   (\(x) collapsibleTree(     x,     hierarchy = names(x),     root = "・"   ))()

what: Possible values for kcity in combine_fude() and extract_boundary()
title: Structure of combined Fude Polygon data with agricultural community boundary data
text: 出典：農林水産省「農業集落境界データ（2020年度）」を加工して作成。
code: library(paletteer)  ggplot(b[[1]] |> filter(city_name == "松山市")) +   geom_sf(aes(fill = kcity_name), alpha = .8) +   theme_void() +   theme(text = element_text(family = "Hiragino Sans")) +   paletteer::scale_fill_paletteer_d("Polychrome::kelly")

title: Using `gghighlight` package
text: 出典：農林水産省「筆ポリゴンデータ（2025年度公開）」および「農業集落境界データ（2020年度）」を加工して作成。
code: library(fude) library(dplyr) library(ggplot2) library(gghighlight)  d <- read_fude("~/MB0001_2025_2020_38.zip", quiet = TRUE, supplementary = TRUE) b <- get_boundary(d, path = "~", quiet = TRUE) db <- combine_fude(d, b, city = "西条", kcity = "丹原|田野")  ggplot() +   geom_sf(data = db$rcom, aes(fill = rcom_name), alpha = 0) +   geom_sf(data = db$fude, aes(fill = rcom_name), linewidth = 0) +   gghighlight() +   facet_wrap(~ rcom_name) +   theme_void() +   theme(     legend.position = "none",     text = element_text(family = "Hiragino Sans")   ) ggplot(data = db$fude, aes(x = a, fill = land_type_jp)) +   geom_histogram(position = "identity", alpha = .5) +   labs(x = "面積（a）",        y = "頻度") +   facet_wrap(~ rcom_name) +   labs(fill = "耕地の種類") +   theme_minimal() +   theme(text = element_text(family = "Hiragino Sans"))

title: Drawing agricultural community boundaries
text: package may beneficial, especially R beginners, simply wanting draw agricultural community boundaries.  出典：農林水産省「農業集落境界データ（2020年度）」を加工して作成。  出典：農林水産省「農業集落境界データ（2020年度）」を加工して作成。  出典：農林水産省「農業集落境界データ（2020年度）」を加工して作成。  出典：農林水産省「農業集落境界データ（2020年度）」を加工して作成。  出典：農林水産省「農業集落境界データ（2020年度）」を加工して作成。  出典：農林水産省「農業集落境界データ（2020年度）」を加工して作成。
code: library(fude) library(dplyr) library(ggplot2) library(gghighlight) library(ggrepel)  b <- get_boundary("38", path = "~", quiet = TRUE) eb <- extract_boundary(b, city = "松山市", kcity = "浅海|立岩|難波|正岡|北条|河野|粟井")  ggplot(data = eb, aes(fill = kcity_name)) +   geom_sf(alpha = .2) +   geom_sf_text(aes(label = rcom_name), size = 2, family = "Hiragino Sans") +   theme_void() eb <- extract_boundary(b, city = "", rcom = "大浦", layer = TRUE)  ggplot(data = eb$city) +   geom_sf(aes(fill = fill)) +   theme_void() ggplot(data = eb$kcity) +   geom_sf(aes(fill = fill)) +   theme_void() ggplot() +   geom_sf(data = eb$city) +   geom_sf(data = eb$rcom, aes(fill = key)) +   scale_fill_discrete(     name   = "農業集落",     labels = eb$rcom$rcom_name   ) +   theme_void() eb <- extract_boundary(b, city = "西予市", kcity = "遊子川", layer = TRUE)  ggplot() +   geom_sf(data = eb$pref, fill = NA) +   geom_sf(data = eb$city, fill = "gray") +   gghighlight(fill == 1,     unhighlighted_params = list(       alpha = .05     )) +   geom_sf(data = eb$kcity |> filter(fill == 1), fill = "black") +   geom_sf_text(     data = eb$city |> filter(fill == 1),     aes(label = city_name),     size = 3,     nudge_x = -.025, nudge_y = -.025,     family = "HiraKakuProN-W3"   ) +   geom_point(data = eb$rcom_union, aes(x = x, y = y), colour = "black") +   geom_text_repel(     data = eb$rcom_union,     aes(x = x, y = y),     label = "遊子川地区",     nudge_x = .3, nudge_y = -.025,     segment.color = "black",     size = 3,     family = "HiraKakuProN-W3"   ) +   theme_void() eb <- extract_boundary(b, city = "八幡浜市", kcity = "真穴", layer = TRUE)  ggplot(data = eb$city |> filter(fill == 1)) +   geom_sf(fill = "gray") +   geom_sf_text(aes(label = city_name), family = "HiraKakuProN-W3") +   geom_sf(data = eb$rcom, fill = "ivory") + # geom_sf(data = eb$fude, aes(fill = land_type), colour = NA) +   geom_sf_label(data = eb$rcom, aes(label = rcom_name), family = "HiraKakuProN-W3") +   theme_void() +   theme(legend.position = "none")

title: Practical mapping examples
text: Source: Created processing data Ministry Agriculture, Forestry Fisheries, “Fude Polygon Data (released FY 2025)” “Agricultural Community Boundary Data (FY 2020)”.
code: library(fude) library(dplyr) library(sf) library(ggplot2) library(ggforce)  d <- read_fude("~/MB0001_2025_2020_38.zip", quiet = TRUE, supplementary = TRUE) b <- get_boundary(d, path = "~", quiet = TRUE) db <- combine_fude(d, b, city = "松山市", kcity = "興居島", rcom = "^(?!釣島)") bbox <- sf::st_bbox(db$fude)  ggplot() +   geom_sf(data = db$rcom, fill = NA) +   geom_sf(data = db$fude, aes(fill = rcom_romaji)) +   geom_mark_hull(     data = db$fude |>       group_by(rcom) |>       mutate(         n = gsub(           "c\\(|\\)",           "",            paste0(             "Count of Fude: ", n(), "\n",             list(table(land_type))           ))       ),     aes(x = point_lng, y = point_lat,         fill = rcom_romaji,         label = rcom_romaji,         description = n),     colour = NA,     expand = unit(1, "mm"),     radius = unit(1, "mm"),     label.fontsize = 9,     label.family = "Helvetica",     label.fill = "white",     label.colour = "black", #   label.buffer = unit(0, "pt"),     con.colour = "black"   ) +   coord_sf(     xlim = c(bbox["xmin"] - 0.02, bbox["xmax"] + 0.02),     ylim = c(bbox["ymin"] - 0.01, bbox["ymax"] + 0.01)   ) +   theme_void() +   theme(legend.position = "none")

what: Displaying a wide area map with cowplot
title: Practical mapping examples
text: want particular details map, example, execute following code.  出典：農林水産省「筆ポリゴンデータ（2025年度公開）」および「農業集落境界データ（2020年度）」を加工して作成。
code: library(gghighlight) library(ggrepel) library(cowplot)  minimap <- ggplot() +   geom_sf(data = db$city, aes(fill = fill), color = NA) +   geom_sf_text(data = db$city, aes(label = city_name), family = "Hiragino Sans") +   gghighlight(fill == 1) +   geom_sf(data = db$rcom_union, fill = "black", linewidth = 0) +   theme_void() +   theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill = "aliceblue")) +   scale_fill_manual(values = c("white", "gray"))  mainmap <- ggplot() +   geom_sf(data = db$rcom, fill = "white") +   geom_sf(data = db$fude, aes(fill = rcom_name)) +   geom_point(data = db$rcom, aes(x = x, y = y), colour = "gray") +   geom_text_repel(     data = db$rcom,     aes(x = x, y = y, label = rcom_name),     nudge_x = c(-.01, .01, -.01, -.01, .005, -.008, .01, .01),     nudge_y = c(.005, .005, 0, .01, -.005, .004, 0, -.005),     min.segment.length = .01,     segment.color = "gray",     size = 3,     family = "Hiragino Sans"   ) +   theme_void() +   theme(legend.position = "none")  bbox <- sf::st_bbox(db$city[db$city$fill == 1, ]) bbox_rcom <- sf::st_bbox(db$rcom)  ggdraw(mainmap) +   draw_plot(     {       minimap +         geom_rect(           aes(             xmin = bbox_rcom$xmin, xmax = bbox_rcom$xmax,             ymin = bbox_rcom$ymin, ymax = bbox_rcom$ymax           ),           fill = NA,           colour = "black",           size = .5         ) +         coord_sf(           xlim = bbox[c("xmin", "xmax")] + c(-.2, .2),           ylim = bbox[c("ymin", "ymax")],           expand = FALSE         ) +         theme(legend.position = "none")     },     x = .7,      y = 0,     width = .3,      height = .3   )

title: Practical mapping examples with MAFF data
text: Read data MAFF database 地域の農業を見て・知って・活かすDB.  資料：農林水産省「農業集落境界データ（2020年度）」を加工して作成。  資料：農林水産省「農業集落境界データ（2020年度）」を加工して作成。  資料：農林水産省「農業集落境界データ（2020年度）」を加工して作成。
code: library(fude) library(ggplot2)  d <- read_fude("~/MB0001_2025_2020_38.zip", quiet = TRUE) b1 <- get_boundary(d, path = "~", boundary_type = 1, quiet = TRUE) m1 <- read_ikasudb(b1, "~/IA0001_2023_2020_38.xlsx")  m1$地域類型1次分類 <- factor(m1$地域類型1次分類, labels = c("都市的地域", "平地農業地域", "中間農業地域", "山間農業地域"))  ggplot() +   geom_sf(data = m1, aes(fill = 地域類型1次分類), alpha = .8) +   theme_void() +   theme(text = element_text(family = "Hiragino Sans")) b2 <- get_boundary(d, path = "~", boundary_type = 2, quiet = TRUE) m2 <- read_ikasudb(b2, "~/IA0001_2023_2020_38.xlsx")  m2$地域類型1次分類 <- factor(m2$地域類型1次分類, labels = c("都市的地域", "平地農業地域", "中間農業地域", "山間農業地域"))  ggplot() +   geom_sf(data = m2, aes(fill = 地域類型1次分類), alpha = .8) +   theme_void() +   theme(text = element_text(family = "Hiragino Sans")) b3 <- get_boundary(d, path = "~", boundary_type = 3, quiet = TRUE) m3 <- read_ikasudb(b3, "~/IA0001_2023_2020_38.xlsx")  m3$地域類型1次分類 <- factor(m3$地域類型1次分類, levels = 1:4, labels = c("都市的地域", "平地農業地域", "中間農業地域", "山間農業地域"))  ggplot() +   geom_sf(data = m3, aes(fill = 地域類型1次分類), alpha = .8) +   theme_void() +   theme(text = element_text(family = "Hiragino Sans")) library(ggtext)  m1 <- read_ikasudb(b1, "~/SA1066_2020_2020_38.xlsx")  ggplot() +   geom_sf(data = m1, aes(fill = `類別作付（栽培）面積_果樹類`), color = "grey60") +   scale_fill_gradient(     low  = "white",     high = "darkorange",     na.value = "grey90"   ) +   labs(caption = paste0("**資料**：", cite_fude(m1)$ja)) +   theme_void() +   theme(     plot.caption = element_markdown(size = 7, hjust = 0),     text = element_text(family = "Hiragino Sans")   ) m2 <- read_ikasudb(b2, "~/SA1066_2020_2020_38.xlsx")  ggplot() +   geom_sf(data = m2, aes(fill = `類別作付（栽培）面積_果樹類`), color = "grey60") +   scale_fill_gradient(     low  = "white",     high = "darkorange",     na.value = "grey90"   ) +   labs(caption = paste0("**資料**：", cite_fude(m2)$ja)) +   theme_void() +   theme(     plot.caption = element_markdown(size = 7, hjust = 0),     text = element_text(family = "Hiragino Sans")   ) m3 <- read_ikasudb(b3, "~/SA1066_2020_2020_38.xlsx")  ggplot() +   geom_sf(data = m3, aes(fill = `類別作付（栽培）面積_果樹類`), color = "grey60") +   scale_fill_gradient(     low  = "white",     high = "darkorange",     na.value = "grey90"   ) +   labs(caption = paste0("**資料**：", cite_fude(m3)$ja)) +   theme_void() +   theme(     plot.caption = element_markdown(size = 7, hjust = 0),     text = element_text(family = "Hiragino Sans")   ) m1 <- b1 |>   read_ikasudb("~/GC0001_2019_2020_38.xlsx")  library(mapview)  mapview(m1, zcol = "組織数")  t1 <- extract_boundary(m1, city = "東温")  mapview(t1, zcol = "組織数") m1 <- b1 |>   read_ikasudb("~/GC0001_2019_2020_38.xlsx")  for (i in setdiff(names(m1), names(b1[[1]]))) {   p <- ggplot() +     geom_sf(data = m1, aes(fill = .data[[i]]), color = "grey60") +     scale_fill_gradient(       low  = "white",       high = "darkblue",       na.value = "grey90"     ) +     labs(caption = paste0("**資料**：", cite_fude(m1)$ja)) +     theme_void() +     theme(       plot.caption = element_markdown(size = 7, hjust = 0),       text = element_text(family = "Hiragino Sans")     )    print(p)   # ggsave(paste0(i, ".png"), p) }

what: Relationship between the residences of farmers and their farmland
title: Relationship between the residences of farmers and their farmland
text: can also visualize relationship residences farmers farmland.
code: library(fude) library(dplyr) library(sf) library(osmdata) library(ggplot2) library(ggmapinset) library(ggrepel)  d <- read_fude("~/MB0001_2025_2020_38.zip", quiet = TRUE, supplementary = TRUE) b <- get_boundary(d, path = "~", quiet = TRUE) db <- combine_fude(d, b, city = "松山", rcom = "和気|安城寺|長戸|久万ノ台")  set.seed(200) probabilities <- c(0.97, 0.01, 0.005, 0.005, 0.005, 0.005) names(probabilities) <- LETTERS[1:length(probabilities)] db$fude$farmer = factor(   sample(     names(probabilities),     nrow(db$fude),     replace = TRUE,     prob = probabilities   ) )  farm <- db$fude |>   summarise(geometry = sf::st_union(geometry) |> sf::st_centroid(), .by = farmer) |>   sf::st_set_crs(4326)  farm_radius <- farm |>   sf::st_transform(crs = sp::CRS("+init=epsg:32632")) |>   sf::st_buffer(dist = units::as_units(1, "km")) |>   sf::st_transform(crs = 4326)  bbox <- sf::st_bbox(db$fude)  streets <- bbox |>   osmdata::opq() |>   osmdata::add_osm_feature(     key = "highway",      value = c("motorway", "primary", "secondary", "tertiary", "residential",                "living_street", "unclassified", "service", "footway")) |>   osmdata::osmdata_sf()  river <- bbox |>   osmdata::opq() |>   osmdata::add_osm_feature(key = "waterway", value = "river") |>   osmdata::osmdata_sf()  inset1 <- configure_inset(     centre = sf::st_geometry(farm)[farm$farmer == "F"],     scale = 3,     translation = c(-4, 1),     radius = 1,     units = "km"   ) inset2 <- configure_inset(     centre = sf::st_geometry(farm)[farm$farmer == "E"],     scale = 3,     translation = c(4, -3),     radius = 1,     units = "km"   )  farm$x <- sf::st_coordinates(farm)[, 1] farm$y <- sf::st_coordinates(farm)[, 2]  ggplot(data = db$fude) +   geom_sf(data = streets$osm_lines, colour = "gray") +   geom_sf(data = river$osm_lines, colour = "skyblue") +   geom_sf(aes(fill = farmer, colour = farmer), alpha = .5) +   geom_sf(data = farm, aes(colour = farmer)) +   geom_text_repel(     data = farm,     aes(x = x, y = y, label = farmer),     nudge_x = c(.02, .02, .02, -.01, .02, -.012),     nudge_y = c(.01, 0, -.005, -.005, .01, -.005),     min.segment.length = 0,     segment.color = "black",     size = 3,     family = "Helvetica"   ) +   geom_sf_inset(data = streets$osm_lines, colour = "gray", map_base = "none", inset = inset1) +   geom_sf_inset(data = river$osm_lines, colour = "skyblue", map_base = "none", inset = inset1) +   geom_sf_inset(aes(fill = farmer, colour = farmer), alpha = .5, map_base = "none", inset = inset1) +   geom_inset_frame(inset = inset1) +   geom_sf_inset(data = streets$osm_lines, colour = "gray", map_base = "none", inset = inset2) +   geom_sf_inset(data = river$osm_lines, colour = "skyblue", map_base = "none", inset = inset2) +   geom_sf_inset(aes(fill = farmer, colour = farmer), alpha = .5, map_base = "none", inset = inset2) +   geom_inset_frame(inset = inset2) +   theme_void() +   theme(legend.position = "none")

title: Testing the functionality
text: 出典：農林水産省「筆ポリゴンデータ（2025年度公開）」および「農業集落境界データ（2020年度）」を加工して作成。
code: library(fude) library(dplyr) library(ggplot2) library(sf) library(patchwork)  d <- read_fude("~/MB0001_2025_2020_38.zip", quiet = TRUE, supplementary = TRUE) b <- get_boundary(d, path = "~", quiet = TRUE) db <- combine_fude(d, b, city = "松山市", rcom = "由良|北浦|鷲ケ巣|門田|馬磯|泊|御手洗|船越")  db$fude_points <- db$fude |>   sf::st_drop_geometry() |>   dplyr::mutate(     geometry = purrr::map(centroid, \(d) sf::st_point(c(d[1], d[2])))   ) |>   dplyr::mutate(     geometry = sf::st_sfc(geometry, crs = 4326)   ) |>   sf::st_as_sf(crs = 4326)  fude_points_projected <- sf::st_transform(db$fude_points, crs = 6677) rcom_union_projected <- sf::st_transform(db$rcom_union, crs = 6677)  voronoi <- fude_points_projected |>   sf::st_geometry() |>   sf::st_union() |>   sf::st_voronoi() |>   sf::st_collection_extract(type = "POLYGON") |>   sf::st_sf(crs = 6677) |>   sf::st_intersection(y = sf::st_geometry(rcom_union_projected)) |>   sf::st_join(y = fude_points_projected) |>   sf::st_cast("POLYGON") |>   sf::st_transform(crs = 4326)  map1 <- ggplot() +   geom_sf(     data = db$fude |> filter(rcom_name == "泊"),     aes(fill = rcom_name),     linewidth = .3   ) +   geom_sf(data = db$fude_points |> filter(rcom_name == "泊"), size = .5) +   geom_sf(     data = db$rcom |> filter(rcom_name == "泊"),     aes(fill = rcom_name),     alpha = 0,     linewidth = 1   ) +   theme_void() +   theme(legend.position = "none")  map2 <- ggplot() +   geom_sf(     data = voronoi |> filter(rcom_name == "泊"),     aes(fill = rcom_name),     linewidth = .3   ) +   geom_sf(data = db$fude_points |> filter(rcom_name == "泊"), size = .5) +   geom_sf(     data = db$rcom |> filter(rcom_name == "泊"),     aes(fill = rcom_name),     alpha = 0,     linewidth = 1   ) +   theme_void() +   theme(legend.position = "none")  map1 + map2 voronoi$area_voronoi <- sf::st_area(voronoi) voronoi$a_voronoi <- as.numeric(units::set_units(voronoi$area_voronoi, "a"))  ggplot(data = voronoi, aes(x = a_voronoi, fill = land_type_jp)) +   geom_histogram(position = "identity", alpha = .5) +   labs(x = "面積（a）", y = "頻度") +   facet_wrap(~ rcom_name) +   labs(fill = "耕地の種類") +   theme_minimal() +   theme(text = element_text(family = "Hiragino Sans"))

title: Testing the functionality
text: 出典：農林水産省「筆ポリゴンデータ（2025年度公開）」および「農業集落境界データ（2020年度）」を加工して作成。
code: library(spdep)  coords <- sf::st_coordinates(sf::st_centroid(voronoi)) nb <- spdep::poly2nb(voronoi, queen = TRUE) plot(nb, coords, cex = .01, col = "red") lw <- spdep::nb2listw(nb, style = "W", zero.policy = TRUE) (moran_test <- spdep::moran.test(voronoi$a, listw = lw)) ##  ##  Moran I test under randomisation ##  ## data:  voronoi$a   ## weights: lw   ## n reduced by no-neighbour observations   ##  ## Moran I statistic standard deviate = 15.07, p-value < 2.2e-16 ## alternative hypothesis: greater ## sample estimates: ## Moran I statistic       Expectation          Variance  ##      0.2303868599     -0.0006510417      0.0002350355 localmoran <- spdep::localmoran(voronoi$a, listw = lw) localmoran_df <- as.data.frame(localmoran) voronoi$Ii <- localmoran_df$Ii  gI <- ggplot() +   geom_sf(data = voronoi, aes(fill = Ii), colour = "black", linewidth = 0) +   scale_fill_gradient2(     low = "blue",     mid = "white",     high = "red",     midpoint = 0,     space = "Lab",     na.value = "grey50",     guide = "colourbar",     aesthetics = "fill"   ) +   theme_void()  voronoi$p_values <- localmoran_df[, "Pr(z != E(Ii))"] sum(voronoi$p_values < 0.1, na.rm = TRUE) / nrow(voronoi) ## [1] 0.1885566 gp <- ggplot() +   geom_sf(     data = voronoi,     aes(fill = p_values),     colour = "black",     linewidth = 0   ) +   scale_fill_gradient2(     low = "blue",     mid = "white",     high = "red",     midpoint = 0.1,     space = "Lab",     na.value = "grey50",     guide = "colourbar",     aesthetics = "fill"   ) +   theme_void()  gI + gp

title: Testing the functionality
text: 出典：農林水産省「筆ポリゴンデータ（2025年度公開）」および「農業集落境界データ（2020年度）」を加工して作成。  出典：農林水産省「筆ポリゴンデータ（2025年度公開）」および「農業集落境界データ（2020年度）」を加工して作成。
code: coords1 <- sf::st_coordinates(db$fude_points) nb1 <- spdep::knn2nb(spdep::knearneigh(coords1, k = 4))  coords2 <- sf::st_coordinates(sf::st_centroid(voronoi)) nb2 <- spdep::knn2nb(spdep::knearneigh(coords2, k = 4))  par(mfrow = c(1, 2)) plot(nb1, coords1, cex = .010, col = "red") plot(nb2, coords2, cex = .010, col = "red") lw1 <- spdep::nb2listw(nb1, style = "W") (moran_test1 <- spdep::moran.test(db$fude_points$a, listw = lw1)) ##  ##  Moran I test under randomisation ##  ## data:  db$fude_points$a   ## weights: lw1     ##  ## Moran I statistic standard deviate = 13.71, p-value < 2.2e-16 ## alternative hypothesis: greater ## sample estimates: ## Moran I statistic       Expectation          Variance  ##      0.2315774216     -0.0006506181      0.0002868963 lw2 <- spdep::nb2listw(nb2, style = "W") (moran_test2 <- spdep::moran.test(voronoi$a, listw = lw2)) ##  ##  Moran I test under randomisation ##  ## data:  voronoi$a   ## weights: lw2     ##  ## Moran I statistic standard deviate = 13.383, p-value < 2.2e-16 ## alternative hypothesis: greater ## sample estimates: ## Moran I statistic       Expectation          Variance  ##      0.2254979130     -0.0006506181      0.0002855370 localmoran <- spdep::localmoran(db$fude_points$a, listw = lw1) localmoran_df <- as.data.frame(localmoran) db$fude2 <- db$fude db$fude2$Ii <- localmoran_df$Ii  gI <- ggplot() +   geom_sf(data = db$fude2, aes(fill = Ii), colour = "black", linewidth = 0) +   scale_fill_gradient2(     low = "blue",     mid = "white",     high = "red",     midpoint = 0,     space = "Lab",     na.value = "grey50",     guide = "colourbar",     aesthetics = "fill"   ) +   theme_void()  db$fude2$p_values <- localmoran_df[, "Pr(z != E(Ii))"] sum(db$fude2$p_values < 0.1) / nrow(db$fude2) ## [1] 0.1254876 gp <- ggplot() +   geom_sf(     data = db$fude2,     aes(fill = p_values),     colour = "black",     linewidth = 0   ) +   scale_fill_gradient2(     low = "blue",     mid = "white",     high = "red",     midpoint = 0.1,     space = "Lab",     na.value = "grey50",     guide = "colourbar",     aesthetics = "fill"   ) +   theme_void()  gI + gp localmoran <- spdep::localmoran(voronoi$a, listw = lw2) localmoran_df <- as.data.frame(localmoran) voronoi$Ii <- localmoran_df$Ii  gI <- ggplot() +   geom_sf(data = voronoi, aes(fill = Ii), colour = "black", linewidth = 0) +   scale_fill_gradient2(     low = "blue",     mid = "white",     high = "red",     midpoint = 0,     space = "Lab",     na.value = "grey50",     guide = "colourbar",     aesthetics = "fill"   ) +   theme_void()  voronoi$p_values <- localmoran_df[, "Pr(z != E(Ii))"] sum(voronoi$p_values < 0.1) / nrow(voronoi) ## [1] 0.1274382 gp <- ggplot() +   geom_sf(     data = voronoi,     aes(fill = p_values),     colour = "black",     linewidth = 0   ) +   scale_fill_gradient2(     low = "blue",     mid = "white",     high = "red",     midpoint = 0.1,     space = "Lab",     na.value = "grey50",     guide = "colourbar",     aesthetics = "fill"   ) +   theme_void()  gI + gp

title: Authors and Citation
text: Takeshi Nishimura. Author, copyright holder, maintainer.

title: Authors and Citation
text: Nishimura T (2026). fude: Utilities Fude Polygon. R package version 0.4.0.9000, https://github.com/takeshinishimura/fude.
code: @Manual{,   title = {fude: Utilities for Fude Polygon},   author = {Takeshi Nishimura},   year = {2026},   note = {R package version 0.4.0.9000},   url = {https://github.com/takeshinishimura/fude}, }

title: Utilities for Fude Polygon
text: fude package provides utilities facilitate handling Fude Polygon data downloadable Ministry Agriculture, Forestry Fisheries (MAFF) website. word “fude” Japanese counter suffix used denote land parcels.

title: Utilities for Fude Polygon
text: Fude Polygon data can now downloaded two different MAFF websites (available Japanese): GeoJSON format:https://open.fude.maff.go.jp FlatGeobuf format:https://www.maff.go.jp/j/tokei/census/shuraku_data/2020/mb/

title: Utilities for Fude Polygon
text: can install released version fude CRAN : development version GitHub :
code: install.packages("fude") # install.packages("devtools") devtools::install_github("takeshinishimura/fude")

title: Utilities for Fude Polygon
text: two ways load Fude Polygon data, depending data obtained: locally saved ZIP file: method works GeoJSON (Obtaining Data #1) FlatGeobuf (Obtaining Data #2) formats. can load ZIP file saved computer without unzipping . specifying prefecture name code: method available FlatGeobuf data (Obtaining Data #2). Provide name prefecture (e.g., “愛媛”) corresponding prefecture code (e.g., “38”), required FlatGeobuf format ZIP file automatically downloaded loaded.
code: library(fude) d <- read_fude("~/2022_38.zip") d2 <- read_fude(pref = "愛媛")

what: List the contents of Fude Polygon datal
title: Utilities for Fude Polygon
Utilities for Fude Polygon
text: Note: feature available data obtained GeoJSON (Obtaining Data #1). Convert local government codes Japanese municipality names easier management. can also rename columns Romaji instead Japanese.

title: Utilities for Fude Polygon
text: Download agricultural community boundary data, corresponds Fude Polygon data, MAFF website: https://www.maff.go.jp/j/tokei/census/shuraku_data/2020/ma/ (available Japanese).
code: b <- get_boundary(d)

what: Combine Fude Polygons with agricultural community boundaries
title: Utilities for Fude Polygon
text: can easily combine Fude Polygons agricultural community boundaries create enriched spatial analyses maps.  出典：農林水産省「筆ポリゴンデータ（2025年度公開）」および「農業集落境界データ（2020年度）」を加工して作成。 Data enables extraction based municipality names, former municipality names, agricultural community names. Note: feature available data obtained FlatGeobuf (Obtaining Data #2).
code: library(ggplot2)  db <- combine_fude(d2, b, city = "松山市", rcom = "由良|北浦|鷲ケ巣|門田|馬磯|泊|御手洗|船越")  ggplot() +   geom_sf(data = db$fude, aes(fill = rcom_name), alpha = .8) +   guides(fill = guide_legend(reverse = TRUE, title = "興居島の集落別耕地")) +   theme_void() +   theme(legend.position = "bottom") +   theme(text = element_text(family = "Hiragino Sans")) extract_fude(d2, city = "松山市", kcity = "興居島") #> Simple feature collection with 1691 features and 6 fields #> Geometry type: MULTIPOLYGON #> Dimension:     XY #> Bounding box:  xmin: 132.6373 ymin: 33.87055 xmax: 132.6991 ymax: 33.92544 #> Geodetic CRS:  JGD2000 #> # A tibble: 1,691 × 7 #>    polygon_uuid                   land_type issue_year point_lng point_lat key   #>  * <chr>                              <dbl>      <dbl>     <dbl>     <dbl> <chr> #>  1 5a72b4ef-b5f4-465e-9948-e9314…       200       2025      133.      33.9 3820… #>  2 c69d86d5-1fb2-4528-a87b-155d8…       200       2025      133.      33.9 3820… #>  3 627134ea-919c-4769-bd94-be16c…       200       2025      133.      33.9 3820… #>  4 f2631019-d16e-42f9-8501-75f26…       200       2025      133.      33.9 3820… #>  5 8fedb70d-4bb9-4447-879b-a0eea…       200       2025      133.      33.9 3820… #>  6 cd235cdf-da51-4ead-ad50-efc6e…       200       2025      133.      33.9 3820… #>  7 5853b7a1-62c3-4973-9e79-cabd3…       200       2025      133.      33.9 3820… #>  8 5e090780-6d16-4b9e-aca9-c5622…       200       2025      133.      33.9 3820… #>  9 90de4abf-e972-4031-987f-f3391…       200       2025      133.      33.9 3820… #> 10 e5ade914-c803-42d1-9fa8-0921b…       200       2025      133.      33.9 3820… #> # ℹ 1,681 more rows #> # ℹ 1 more variable: geometry <MULTIPOLYGON [°]>

title: Utilities for Fude Polygon
text: can explore Fude Polygon data interactively.
code: library(shiny)  s <- shiny_fude(db, rcom = TRUE) # shinyApp(ui = s$ui, server = s$server)

what: Read data from the MAFF database
title: Utilities for Fude Polygon
text: can read data MAFF database (地域の農業を見て・知って・活かすDB).  資料：農林水産省「農業集落境界データ（2020年度）」を加工して作成。
code: library(dplyr)  b1 <- get_boundary(d2, path = "~", boundary_type = 1, quiet = TRUE) b2 <- get_boundary(d2, path = "~", boundary_type = 2, quiet = TRUE) b3 <- get_boundary(d2, path = "~", boundary_type = 3, quiet = TRUE)  m1 <- b1 |>   read_ikasudb("~/IA0001_2023_2020_38.xlsx") |>   read_ikasudb("~/SA1009_2020_2020_38.xlsx") |>   read_ikasudb("~/GC0001_2019_2020_38.xlsx") |>   mutate(     地域類型1次分類 = factor(地域類型1次分類, labels = c("都市的地域", "平地農業地域", "中間農業地域", "山間農業地域"))   )  ggplot() +   geom_sf(data = m1, aes(fill = 地域類型1次分類), alpha = .8) +   theme_void() +   theme(text = element_text(family = "Hiragino Sans"))

title: Utilities for Fude Polygon
text: want use mapview(), following.
code: db1 <- combine_fude(d, b, city = "伊方町") db2 <- combine_fude(d, b, city = "八幡浜市") db3 <- combine_fude(d, b, city = "西予市", kcity = "三瓶|二木生|三島|双岩")  db <- bind_fude(db1, db2, db3) db$fude <- sf::st_transform(db$fude, crs = 3857)  library(mapview)  mapview(db$fude, zcol = "rcom_name", layer.name = "農業集落名")

what: Bind multiple Fude Polygon data objects — bind_fude
title: Bind multiple Fude Polygon data objects — bind_fude
text: bind_fude() combines multiple Fude Polygon data objects binding elements names across inputs. can also used objects already combined combine_fude().

title: Bind multiple Fude Polygon data objects — bind_fude
code: bind_fude(...)

title: Bind multiple Fude Polygon data objects — bind_fude
text: ... Two Fude Polygon data objects combine. Named elements appear multiple inputs row-bound single sf::sf() object.

title: Bind multiple Fude Polygon data objects — bind_fude
text: named list sf::sf() objects.

title: Bind multiple Fude Polygon data objects — bind_fude
code: path <- system.file("extdata", "castle.zip", package = "fude") d1 <- read_fude(path, quiet = TRUE) d2 <- read_fude(path, quiet = TRUE) bind_fude(d1, d2) #> $`2021_382019` #> Simple feature collection with 1 feature and 7 fields #> Geometry type: POLYGON #> Dimension:     XY #> Bounding box:  xmin: 132.7653 ymin: 33.84506 xmax: 132.7662 ymax: 33.84575 #> Geodetic CRS:  WGS 84 #> # A tibble: 1 × 8 #>   polygon_uuid    X_color X_opacity X_weight X_fillColor X_fillOpacity #>   <chr>           <chr>       <dbl>    <int> <chr>               <dbl> #> 1 dummy-uuid-0001 #000000       0.5        3 #ff0000               0.5 #> # ℹ 2 more variables: local_government_cd <chr>, geometry <POLYGON [°]> #>  #> $`2022_382019` #> Simple feature collection with 1 feature and 7 fields #> Geometry type: POLYGON #> Dimension:     XY #> Bounding box:  xmin: 132.7653 ymin: 33.84506 xmax: 132.7662 ymax: 33.84575 #> Geodetic CRS:  WGS 84 #> # A tibble: 1 × 8 #>   polygon_uuid    X_color X_opacity X_weight X_fillColor X_fillOpacity #>   <chr>           <chr>       <dbl>    <int> <chr>               <dbl> #> 1 dummy-uuid-0002 #000000       0.5        3 #ff0000               0.5 #> # ℹ 2 more variables: local_government_cd <chr>, geometry <POLYGON [°]> #>  #> $`2022_382078` #> Simple feature collection with 1 feature and 7 fields #> Geometry type: POLYGON #> Dimension:     XY #> Bounding box:  xmin: 132.541 ymin: 33.50931 xmax: 132.5415 ymax: 33.50966 #> Geodetic CRS:  WGS 84 #> # A tibble: 1 × 8 #>   polygon_uuid    X_color X_opacity X_weight X_fillColor X_fillOpacity #>   <chr>           <chr>       <dbl>    <int> <chr>               <dbl> #> 1 dummy-uuid-0003 #000000       0.5        3 #ff0000               0.5 #> # ℹ 2 more variables: local_government_cd <chr>, geometry <POLYGON [°]> #>

what: Generate citation text for Fude Polygon data — cite_fude
title: Generate citation text for Fude Polygon data — cite_fude
text: cite_fude() generates citation text Japanese English Fude Polygon data related boundary data.

title: Generate citation text for Fude Polygon data — cite_fude
code: cite_fude(data)

title: Generate citation text for Fude Polygon data — cite_fude
text: data Fude Polygon data object, boundary data object, data frame/list containing issue_year /boundary_data_year.

title: Generate citation text for Fude Polygon data — cite_fude
text: list two elements: ja Japanese citation text en English citation text.

title: City code/name correspondence table — city_code_table
text: dataset containing codes/names cities Japan.

title: City code/name correspondence table — city_code_table
code: city_code_table

title: City code/name correspondence table — city_code_table
text: data frame 1,905 rows 9 variables: key Unique city codes pref_name Prefecture names Kanji pref_kana Prefecture names Hiragana pref_romaji Prefecture names Romaji city_name City names Kanji city_kana City names Hiragana city_romaji City names Romaji local_government_cd Local government codes census_year Year census data derived

what: Combine Fude Polygon data with agricultural community boundary data — combine_fude
title: Combine Fude Polygon data with agricultural community boundary data — combine_fude
text: combine_fude() combines Fude Polygon data agricultural community boundary data returns polygons associated specified municipality, former municipality, /agricultural community.

title: Combine Fude Polygon data with agricultural community boundary data — combine_fude
code: combine_fude(data, boundary, city, kcity = "", rcom = "", year = NULL)

title: Combine Fude Polygon data with agricultural community boundary data — combine_fude
text: data Fude Polygon data object returned read_fude(). boundary Agricultural community boundary data returned get_boundary(). city character vector municipality names local government codes used identify target municipalities. NULL, municipalities kept. kcity character vector regular expression patterns used match former municipality names Japanese. rcom character vector regular expression patterns used match agricultural community names Japanese. year Numeric scalar NULL. multiple Fude Polygon datasets match specified municipality, year used choose target dataset.

title: Combine Fude Polygon data with agricultural community boundary data — combine_fude
text: named list sf::sf() objects.

title: Combine Fude Polygon data with agricultural community boundary data — combine_fude
code: if (FALSE) { # interactive() path <- system.file("extdata", "castle.zip", package = "fude") d <- read_fude(path) b <- get_boundary(d) db <- combine_fude(d, b, "\u677e\u5c71\u5e02", "\u57ce\u6771", year = 2022) }

what: Extract specified agricultural community boundary data — extract_boundary
title: Extract specified agricultural community boundary data — extract_boundary
text: extract_boundary() extracts subsets agricultural community boundary data returned get_boundary() municipality, former municipality, /agricultural community.

title: Extract specified agricultural community boundary data — extract_boundary
code: extract_boundary(boundary, city = "", kcity = "", rcom = "", layer = FALSE)

title: Extract specified agricultural community boundary data — extract_boundary
text: boundary Agricultural community boundary data returned get_boundary(). city character vector municipality names local government codes used identify target municipalities. NULL, municipalities kept. kcity character vector regular expression patterns used match former municipality names Japanese. rcom character vector regular expression patterns used match agricultural community names Japanese. layer Logical. TRUE, return list containing extracted agricultural community boundaries together former municipality, municipality, prefecture boundary layers.

title: Extract specified agricultural community boundary data — extract_boundary
text: layer = FALSE, sf::sf() object. layer = TRUE, named list sf::sf() objects.

what: Extract a subset of Fude Polygon data — extract_fude
title: Extract a subset of Fude Polygon data — extract_fude
text: extract_fude() extracts subset Fude Polygon data returned read_fude() year, municipality, former municipality, /agricultural community.

title: Extract a subset of Fude Polygon data — extract_fude
code: extract_fude(data, year = NULL, city = NULL, kcity = "", rcom = "")

title: Extract a subset of Fude Polygon data — extract_fude
text: data Fude Polygon data object returned read_fude(). data may single data frame list data frames. year numeric vector issue years extract. NULL, years kept. city character vector municipality names local government codes used identify target municipalities. NULL, municipalities kept. kcity character vector regular expression patterns used match former municipality names Japanese. rcom character vector regular expression patterns used match agricultural community names Japanese.

title: Extract a subset of Fude Polygon data — extract_fude
text: sf::sf() object containing extracted subset.

what: Get agricultural community boundary data — get_boundary
title: Get agricultural community boundary data — get_boundary
text: get_boundary() downloads reads one MAFF agricultural community boundary datasets returns named list sf::sf() objects. target prefectures determined data.

title: Get agricultural community boundary data — get_boundary
code: get_boundary(   data,   boundary_data_year = 2020,   rcom_year = 2020,   boundary_type = 1,   path = NULL,   suffix = FALSE,   crs = NULL,   encoding = "CP932",   quiet = FALSE )

title: Get agricultural community boundary data — get_boundary
text: data Either Fude Polygon data object returned read_fude(), prefecture code Japanese prefecture name. boundary_data_year year boundary dataset. rcom_year agricultural community reference year used MAFF file name. boundary_type Integer specifying boundary level read: 1 agricultural community, 2 former municipality, 3 municipality. path Path directory containing boundary ZIP files. NULL, ZIP files downloaded automatically. suffix Logical. FALSE, suffixes removed romaji municipality names, "-shi" "-ku". crs Coordinate reference system transform output data . NULL, source CRS kept. encoding Character encoding source shapefile attributes, "CP932". quiet Logical. TRUE, suppress messages download reading.

title: Get agricultural community boundary data — get_boundary
text: named list sf::sf() objects.

title: Get agricultural community boundary data — get_boundary
code: if (FALSE) { # interactive() path <- system.file("extdata", "castle.zip", package = "fude") d <- read_fude(path) b <- get_boundary(d) }

what: Read Fude Polygon data from a ZIP file — read_fude
title: Read Fude Polygon data from a ZIP file — read_fude
text: read_fude() reads MAFF Fude Polygon data ZIP file returns layers named list sf::sf() objects. path supplied, function downloads ZIP file specified prefecture year using pref, year, rcom_year. ZIP archive may contain one supported spatial files GeoJSON (.json .geojson) FlatGeobuf (.fgb) format. function also works ZIP files created manually, provided original file names preserved.

title: Read Fude Polygon data from a ZIP file — read_fude
code: read_fude(   path = NULL,   pref = NULL,   year = 2025,   rcom_year = 2020,   crs = NULL,   supplementary = FALSE,   quiet = FALSE )

title: Read Fude Polygon data from a ZIP file — read_fude
text: path Path ZIP file containing one supported spatial files. NULL, file downloaded automatically MAFF website using pref, year, rcom_year. pref Prefecture name prefecture code used downloading data. Ignored path supplied. year Fude Polygon data year used download file name. rcom_year agricultural community boundary year used download file name. crs Coordinate reference system transform output layers . NULL, original CRS kept. supplementary Logical. TRUE, add supplementary columns land-use labels polygon area. quiet Logical. TRUE, suppress messages download reading.

title: Read Fude Polygon data from a ZIP file — read_fude
text: named list sf::sf() objects.

title: Read Fude Polygon data from a ZIP file — read_fude
code: path <- system.file("extdata", "castle.zip", package = "fude") d <- read_fude(path) #> Reading layer `2021_382019' from data source  #>   `/private/var/folders/33/1nmp7drn6c56394qxrzb2cth0000gn/T/RtmpOMB1AB/file3df05b35bae8/castle/2021_382019.json'  #>   using driver `GeoJSON' #> Simple feature collection with 1 feature and 7 fields #> Geometry type: POLYGON #> Dimension:     XY #> Bounding box:  xmin: 132.7653 ymin: 33.84506 xmax: 132.7662 ymax: 33.84575 #> Geodetic CRS:  WGS 84 #> Reading layer `2022_382019' from data source  #>   `/private/var/folders/33/1nmp7drn6c56394qxrzb2cth0000gn/T/RtmpOMB1AB/file3df05b35bae8/castle/2022_382019.json'  #>   using driver `GeoJSON' #> Simple feature collection with 1 feature and 7 fields #> Geometry type: POLYGON #> Dimension:     XY #> Bounding box:  xmin: 132.7653 ymin: 33.84506 xmax: 132.7662 ymax: 33.84575 #> Geodetic CRS:  WGS 84 #> Reading layer `2022_382078' from data source  #>   `/private/var/folders/33/1nmp7drn6c56394qxrzb2cth0000gn/T/RtmpOMB1AB/file3df05b35bae8/castle/2022_382078.json'  #>   using driver `GeoJSON' #> Simple feature collection with 1 feature and 7 fields #> Geometry type: POLYGON #> Dimension:     XY #> Bounding box:  xmin: 132.541 ymin: 33.50931 xmax: 132.5415 ymax: 33.50966 #> Geodetic CRS:  WGS 84

title: Rename Fude Polygon data — rename_fude
text: rename_fude() renames elements Fude Polygon data object returned read_fude() replacing local government codes element names corresponding municipality names, making object easier read.

title: Rename Fude Polygon data — rename_fude
code: rename_fude(data, suffix = TRUE, romaji = NULL, quiet = TRUE)

title: Rename Fude Polygon data — rename_fude
text: data Fude Polygon data object returned read_fude(). suffix Logical. FALSE, municipality suffixes removed renamed element names. example, Japanese suffixes "市", "区", "町", "村" removed, romaji suffixes "-shi" "-ku" also removed romaji used. romaji Character scalar NULL. NULL, Japanese municipality names used. Otherwise, municipality names converted romaji. Supported values : "upper" upper case, "title" title case, "lower" lower case. quiet Logical. FALSE, print mapping old names new names.

title: Rename Fude Polygon data — rename_fude
text: Fude Polygon data object renamed elements.

title: Rename Fude Polygon data — rename_fude
code: path <- system.file("extdata", "castle.zip", package = "fude") d <- read_fude(path, quiet = FALSE) #> Reading layer `2021_382019' from data source  #>   `/private/var/folders/33/1nmp7drn6c56394qxrzb2cth0000gn/T/RtmpOMB1AB/file3df029cb6545/castle/2021_382019.json'  #>   using driver `GeoJSON' #> Simple feature collection with 1 feature and 7 fields #> Geometry type: POLYGON #> Dimension:     XY #> Bounding box:  xmin: 132.7653 ymin: 33.84506 xmax: 132.7662 ymax: 33.84575 #> Geodetic CRS:  WGS 84 #> Reading layer `2022_382019' from data source  #>   `/private/var/folders/33/1nmp7drn6c56394qxrzb2cth0000gn/T/RtmpOMB1AB/file3df029cb6545/castle/2022_382019.json'  #>   using driver `GeoJSON' #> Simple feature collection with 1 feature and 7 fields #> Geometry type: POLYGON #> Dimension:     XY #> Bounding box:  xmin: 132.7653 ymin: 33.84506 xmax: 132.7662 ymax: 33.84575 #> Geodetic CRS:  WGS 84 #> Reading layer `2022_382078' from data source  #>   `/private/var/folders/33/1nmp7drn6c56394qxrzb2cth0000gn/T/RtmpOMB1AB/file3df029cb6545/castle/2022_382078.json'  #>   using driver `GeoJSON' #> Simple feature collection with 1 feature and 7 fields #> Geometry type: POLYGON #> Dimension:     XY #> Bounding box:  xmin: 132.541 ymin: 33.50931 xmax: 132.5415 ymax: 33.50966 #> Geodetic CRS:  WGS 84 d2 <- rename_fude(d) d2 <- rename_fude(d, suffix = FALSE) d2 <- rename_fude(d, romaji = "upper")

what: Prepare a Shiny Leaflet viewer for Fude Polygon data — shiny_fude
title: Prepare a Shiny Leaflet viewer for Fude Polygon data — shiny_fude
text: shiny_fude() prepares Shiny user interface server function interactive visualization Fude Polygon data leaflet DT. map supports polygon selection, optional agricultural community boundary overlays, linked attribute table.

title: Prepare a Shiny Leaflet viewer for Fude Polygon data — shiny_fude
code: shiny_fude(data, height = 1000, rcom = FALSE)

title: Prepare a Shiny Leaflet viewer for Fude Polygon data — shiny_fude
text: data Fude Polygon data object, list containing fude rcom elements. rcom = TRUE, data must contain polygon data data$fude agricultural community boundary data data$rcom. height Height map passed leaflet::leafletOutput(). rcom Logical. TRUE, overlay agricultural community boundaries map.

title: Prepare a Shiny Leaflet viewer for Fude Polygon data — shiny_fude
text: list two elements: ui, Shiny UI object, server, Shiny server function.

title: fude (development version)
text: Reduced number packages listed Imports minimized optional package dependencies possible. Improved handling coordinate reference systems (CRS) ensure consistent spatial operations.

title: fude 0.4.0
text: CRAN release: 2026-03-01 Added support processing data without requiring local government code pre-written. Renamed community argument rcom several functions. Standardized column names lowercase. Added support reading data MAFF database (https://www.maff.go.jp/j/tokei/census/shuraku_data/).

title: fude 0.3.7
text: CRAN release: 2024-12-22 Added support reading FlatGeobuf files addition GeoJSON files. Enabled handling agricultural community boundary data without need load Fude polygons. Changed names output list.

title: fude 0.3.6
text: CRAN release: 2024-05-18 Added columns additional information farmland.

title: fude 0.3.5
text: CRAN release: 2023-10-08 Simplified return value combine_fude() eliminating reduced version object.

title: fude 0.3.4
text: CRAN release: 2023-09-19 Added support polygon data split.

title: fude 0.3.3
text: CRAN release: 2023-08-18 Added ability easily draw municipal boundaries.

title: fude 0.3.2
text: Improved process eliminating duplicate agricultural community names.

title: fude 0.3.1
text: CRAN release: 2023-07-15 Minor modifications due elapsed time samples long.

title: fude 0.3.0
text: Added ability combine agricultural community boundary data.

title: fude 0.2.0
text: CRAN release: 2023-06-14 Improved accuracy Roman renaming.

title: fude 0.1.1
text: CRAN release: 2023-05-07 Minor improvements. Initial CRAN release.

title: fude 0.1.0
text: Initial release.
